title: format_arg_help truncates mid-word instead of at word boundary
body:
format_arg_help() in radicli/util.py wraps help text at max_width=70. The current implementation uses a simple character slice which can cut in the middle of a word.



Fix: use textwrap.wrap() or split on whitespace boundaries in format_arg_help().
Add a test in radicli/tests/test_util.py that verifies no word is split across lines.
